name: Spicy Tofu Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into cubes.
2. Drain in a colander.
3. Put the lettuce on the bottom of a shallow bowl or attractive serving dish. Place the tofu in the centre and surround it with one mound each of cucumber, carrot, mushrooms, and peanuts. Refrigerate until chilled.
4. Combine the TOPPING ingredients in a blender or food processor and whip into a rough mixture.
5. Blend together the dressing ingredients.
6. At serving time, sprinkle the topping mixture over the salad then pour on the dressing. Toss at the table.
